channel.title: briefUpdatesHealthOffshootNL
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from briefUpdatesHealthOffshootNL, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: It's a dangerous complication of pregnancy -- but a new drug holds promise
item.description: Researchers celebrate early results of a drug that may become the first treatment for a serious complication of pregnancy called preeclampsia. It's go...

item.title: Dr. Oz pushes AI avatars as a fix for rural health care. Not so fast, critics say
item.description: Dr. Mehmet Oz, who heads the Centers for Medicare and Medicaid Services, is advancing a $50 billion plan to modernize rural health care.

item.title: Journalists Unpack Impact of ICE Arrests on Families and Caffeine’s Effect on Dementia Risk
item.description: KFF Health News journalists made the rounds on national or local media recently to discuss topical stories. Here’s a collection of their appearances.

item.title: Colorectal cancer is leading cancer killer for people under 50
item.description: James Van Der Beek's death at age 48 highlights a sad statistic: More people under 50 are getting colorectal cancer.

item.title: Health Care Heartaches: Your Winning Health Policy Valentines
item.description: KFF Health News shares our favorite reader-submitted health policy valentines. One struck us in the heart and inspired an original cartoon.

item.title: Clinics Sour on CMS After Agency Scraps 10-Year Primary Care Program Only Months In
item.description: A planned 10-year federal program called Making Care Primary was supposed to help primary care doctors by easing administrative burdens, allowing them...

item.title: Amodei Believes “AI-Enabled Autocracy” Could Be Imminent
item.description: By MIKE MAGEE Last month, Dario Amodei, CEO of Anthropic, did it again – scaring the bejesus out of societal leaders worldwide with warnings that thei...

item.title: A familiar move with a new twist: Trump tries to cut CDC funds he just signed into law
item.description: A federal judge in Illinois quickly issued a restraining order after the Trump administration slashed more than $600 million in CDC grants to four blu...

item.title: RFK Jr. made promises to get his job as health secretary. He's broken many of them
item.description: In his confirmation hearings, Robert F. Kennedy Jr. told U.S. senators that he would not cut funding for vaccine research or change the nation's offic...

item.title: RFK Jr. Made Promises in Order To Become Health Secretary. He’s Broken Many of Them.
item.description: Before being confirmed to lead the Department of Health and Human Services, Robert F. Kennedy Jr. told U.S. senators he would not cut funding for vacc...

item.title: ACA Subsidies Expired. Open Enrollment Ended. But It Will Still Take Awhile To Register the Results.
item.description: Get our weekly newsletter, The Week in Brief, featuring a roundup of our original coverage, Fridays at 2 p.m. ET.

item.title: Ten Ten Ten – Trying to radically fix health care in the US
item.description: The goal of the new non profit Ten Ten Ten founded by TJ Tedesco & Bhargav Raman is to take America from being the most expensive health system in the...

item.title: 2026: A Year for Reimagining Healthcare’s Safety Net
item.description: By JEFF BRANDES To say healthcare’s safety net experienced tectonic shifts in 2025 would be an understatement. The rapid introduction of multiple and ...

item.title: Trust No One
item.description: By KIM BELLARD You know, it’s gotten to the point when I just try to tune out the things Robert F. Kennedy Jr. says. “Schizophrenia can be cured with ...

item.title: Carta Healthcare – AI for Registry Creation
item.description: It’s not well known but there’s a lot of people in hospitals who spend a lot of time creating patient registries for quality programs, CMS reporting, ...
